params.prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic wildlife photograph, single barn owl on a dark branch, body pointed forward but head rotated almost all the way around over its left shoulder, face and eyes clearly readable, neck feathers compressed naturally like a real owl, clean uncluttered night woodland background, mobile-readable subject centered, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI, no labels, no arrows, no anatomy diagram, no x-ray, no extra animals, no second head, no distorted body, no gore.
